## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Sunbit's content automation and address technical requirements for seamless integration.](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New B2B and B2C topic clusters introduced to drive merchant signups and shop direct reviews](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Automation process nearly complete; final adjustments needed for webhook payload structure](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Traffic analysis revealed a slight dip; team to monitor for potential trends or anomalies](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Trey platform updates offer improved organization and navigation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Introduced 4 new topic clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [B2B auto merchant adoption](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [B2B dental practice adoption](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [B2C auto repair financing](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [B2C dental care financing](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [10 topics per cluster, including case studies and training-related content](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Targeting high-volume keywords (up to 4,400 searches/month)](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Team to review and select 5-10 initial topics for production](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Automation Progress and Requirements

  - [Webhook payload structure needs refinement:](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [Separate keys for summary and key points (currently in content)](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [Focus keywords to be included in metadata](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [Categories (clusters) to be added for proper blog categorization](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [HTML format preferred over markup for content](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [Image inclusion desired for blog tiles](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Jason implementing temporary fixes (e.g., AI-generated focus keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Plan to ingest \~250 articles into draft status, then manually schedule publishing](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Traffic Analysis and Monitoring

  - [Slight dip in sessions and active users observed](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Four pages lost traffic; team to monitor for trends](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Potential GA tracking issues reported by other managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Recent changes to search result parameters may affect impression data in tools like SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Trey Platform Updates

  - [New project format organizes workflows within products](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Improved navigation between workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Addition of data tables and vector tables for AI](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [More intuitive interface, though still potentially intimidating for new users](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to update webhook payload structure and conduct another test](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Jason to finalize script for extracting key points and summary](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Team to monitor traffic trends and investigate any continued dips](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Explore image integration options for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Continue evaluating enterprise-level automation tools (e.g., Workato) for potential upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/16sGwVity7rjb1u-ycnh7yMjpbkeFot2?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
